case_title: ERIC HARMAN VS. AIRPORT GROUP INTERNATIONAL, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARMAN, ERIC SERVED JUN-17-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRPORT GROUP INTERNATIONAL, INC.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-23-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-08-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF.
